title: Senior AI Full-Stack Software Engineer
company_focus:
Workplace management platform with booking, analytics, and
integrations
description:
FULL-TIME / 100% Remote / Within Europe, or Central European
Time Zone (CET) - candidates outside of that region will not
be considered

Compensation: $75,000 to $85,000 USD per year (Depending on
experience and qualifications)

We actively verify identity and work history during our
interview process, which includes video interviews and a
live technical assessment/review. Applications submitted
using false identities, proxy interviewing, or
misrepresentation will be removed from consideration.

____________________________________________________________
________________

Skedda is a leading global workplace management platform,
serving over 7,000 customers including Toyota, Siemens,
Mercedes-Benz, MIT, and Harvard University. The company is a
key player in shaping the future of the modern workplace
experience with interactive floor plans, desk and meeting
room booking, visitor management, rich utilization
analytics, and integrations with Slack, Microsoft 365, and
Google Workspace. Each year, Skedda wins awards from G2,
Capterra, GetApp, and SoftwareAdvice.

We are seeking a senior, AI-focused full-stack developer to
take on a key role in delivering new features across the
stack, from concept to launch.  This role involves owning
the technical aspects of projects, implementing full test
automation, and solving complex, interesting challenges.
Additionally, this role will build full-stack AI-powered
features, integrating machine learning models and related AI
technologies to advance our product’s capabilities and
harness emerging AI possibilities. You will research, test,
and implement new technologies while collaborating closely
with the team on design, coding standards, and best
practices.

Responsibilities

- Build full-stack AI-powered features, integrating machine
  learning models and related AI technologies to advance our
  product’s capabilities and harness emerging AI
  possibilities
- Provide senior-level implementation for new features across
  the full-stack
- Implement full test automation for your work (we have a
  culture of ownership and quality)
- Own projects from a technical perspective, from
  conceptualization to launch
- Solve complex, but fun, technical challenges
- Research, propose, test, and implement new techniques and
  technologies
- Collaborate with team members on design techniques and
  coding standards

Skills & Experience

- 7+ years of full stack development with C# and .NET/Core
  (ideally SaaS products)
- Strong experience with front end JavaScript frameworks
- Strong experience developing Web APIs
- Strong SQL skills (SQL Server preferred)
- Strong TDD and test automation skills (both unit and
  integration testing)
- Hands-on experience with Azure Cloud
- Azure DevOps experience is a plus

About you

- You honor your word and own whatever you take on
- You love to build intuitive software
- You make mistakes and learn fast
- You like small teams
- You’re not afraid to ask questions
- You pay attention to detail
- You want to make a difference in the real world
- You’re self-driven
- You follow your intuition and sync when needed
- You strive for excellence in everything you do

Benefits

- Competitive salary, benefits package, and paid time off
  - Compensation:The salary for this position is competitive,
    with a range of $75,000 to $85,000 USD per year,
    depending on experience and qualifications.
- Flexible schedule
- Creative and collaborative work environment
- Direct exposure to the leadership team across departments
- Be empowered to leave a significant mark on the product and
  the customers
- A thorough, organized engineering onboarding process for
  quick learning
- Hardware of your choice - PC or Mac
- Develop with the latest platforms, frameworks, tooling and
  standards
- Work in, and maintain, a near zero technical debt
  environment
- Enjoy not having to support IE or Safari < 13
- Our Tech Stack: Azure, .NET 8.x, C# 12, Ember.js 5.7
  (Octane), Bootstrap 5.x,Selenium, Entity Framework 8.x,
  SQL Server 2022, Azure DevOps,

About us

We’re an international team from 20+ countries with a
growing presence in Boston. We place a lot of value on
collaborating asynchronously across time zones but also
understand the benefits of working together in person. Our
team has doubled in size in the last year and continues to
grow quickly.

At Skedda, our Mission is to empower organizations to bring
workspaces to life. We take feedback from customers
seriously and constantly iterate to improve our product.
We’re a self-driven, curious, down-to-earth group of people
who know how to balance moving quickly while maintaining a
high bar for quality. Every team member at Skedda embodies
our six core virtues:

- We are a community
- Quality is at our core
- Take ownership
- Create momentum every day
- Tackle hard problems
- Be curious

We are defining the future of the workplace experience,
helping businesses to design meaningful, seamless, fully
integrated employee experiences and interactions in the
hybrid workplace. We’re growing fast with a lot of new
opportunities ahead!

To learn more about Skedda, please visit
https://www.skedda.com/blog/skedda-mission-vision-virtues.

Implement full test automation for all work

use_cases: AI-powered features for workplace management and booking systems
Integration of machine learning models to enhance product capabilities
Smart analytics and utilization insights for workspace optimization
Interactive floor plans with intelligent recommendations
Meeting room and desk booking with AI-driven scheduling assistance
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves building AI-powered features and
integrating machine learning models directly into the
product, which is hands-on AI implementation work. The
developer will research, test, and implement AI technologies
to advance product capabilities, indicating direct work on
AI systems rather than just supporting infrastructure.
